commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d89c3bd8fb25122e279ae8f1a54ed9f1f6981925)
commands.review_summary:
The PR starts and retains QMD managers for configured boot, interval, or embedding maintenance, makes watcher ignores relative to collection roots, adds focused Gateway and memory-core tests, and isolates a deadcode-test fallback environment.

PR surface: Source +29, Tests +128, Docs +1. Total +158 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source clearly shows that QMD manager startup is limited to boot-sync eligibility and the manager is closed afterward, while the watcher ignore function also evaluates the explicit root name itself; the PR does not include a real runtime reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The author must fix the concrete containment and changelog defects and add real proof, while maintainers explicitly decide the compatibility meaning of `onBoot: false` before merge.

target.title: fix(memory): keep QMD background refreshes armed
target.body:
## Summary

- keep QMD background refresh managers armed when startup is configured for interval/embed work even if boot sync is disabled
- make memory watch ignores relative to configured collection roots so a root named `build`, `dist`, `vendor`, or `.cache` is not ignored wholesale
- add focused gateway and memory-core regression coverage

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/gateway/server-startup-memory.test.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check CHANGELOG.md extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/qmd-manager.ts src/gateway/server-startup-memory.test.ts src/gateway/server-startup-memory.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.test.ts src/gateway/server-startup-post-attach.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`

Broad `pnpm check:changed` was not run locally because this shell has no `pnpm` or `corepack`; PR CI should cover that full lane before merge.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
